# Hybrid Design System — Generated by Ditto

> Blended from 2 inspirations
> Generated on April 9, 2026

## Inspirations
- [Slack | Piattaforma di lavoro basata sull'IA e strumenti di produttività](https://slack.com/intl/it-it) — weight: 50%
- [Maxima Therapy | Personalized Support for Neurodivergent Individuals](https://maximatherapy.com/) — weight: 50%

## Mood Profile
- **Tono**: Giocoso (-0.3)
- **Formalità**: Bilanciato (-0.2)
- **Energia**: Bilanciato (+0.0)
- **Temperatura**: Caldo (-0.4)
- **Densità**: Arioso (-0.4)
- **Forma**: Morbido (-0.4)
- **Profondità**: Bilanciato (-0.2)
- **Palette**: Bilanciato (+0.0)
- **Tipografia**: Espressiva (-0.3)
- **Movimento**: Bilanciato (+0.2)

## Font Setup

### Fonts Used
- **Heading**: `Salesforce-Sans`
- **Body**: `Salesforce-Avant-Garde`
- **Mono**: `ui-monospace`

### CSS Custom Properties
```css
:root {
  --font-heading: 'Salesforce-Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-body: 'Salesforce-Avant-Garde', system-ui, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'ui-monospace', ui-monospace, monospace;
  --font-weight-heading: 600;
  --font-weight-body: 400;
}
```

## Color Palette & Roles

### Primary
- **Primary** (`#175a45`): CTAs, interactive elements, brand moments
- **Secondary** (`#ca6784`): Supporting accents
- **Accent** (`#727678`): Decorative highlights

### Surfaces
- **Background** (`#ffffff`): Page background
- **Surface** (`#f4ede4`): Cards, elevated elements

### Text
- **Primary** (`#000000`): Headings, strong labels
- **Secondary** (`#b35735`): Body text, descriptions
- **Muted** (`#1c66d0`): Placeholders, captions

### Semantic
- **Border** (`#f6eef0`): Dividers, container borders
- **Success** (`#22c55e`): Confirmations
- **Warning** (`#f59e0b`): Caution states
- **Error** (`#ef4444`): Destructive actions

## Typography Rules

| Role | Font | Weight | Notes |
|------|------|--------|-------|
| Display | Salesforce-Sans | 600 | Hero headlines |
| Heading | Salesforce-Sans | 600 | Section titles |
| Body | Salesforce-Avant-Garde | 400 | Standard text |
| Mono | ui-monospace | 400 | Code, technical |

## Component Stylings

### Buttons
**Primary**
- Background: `#175a45`
- Text: `#ffffff`
- Padding: 9px 18px
- Radius: 15px

**Secondary**
- Background: transparent
- Text: `#175a45`
- Border: 1px solid `#f6eef0`
- Radius: 15px

### Cards
- Background: `#f4ede4`
- Border: 1px solid `#f6eef0`
- Radius: 23px
- Shadow: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 10px 0px`

### Inputs
- Background: `#ffffff`
- Border: 1px solid `#f6eef0`
- Radius: 15px
- Focus: 1px solid `#175a45`

## Layout Principles

### Spacing Scale
- XS: 4px, SM: 9px, MD: 18px
- LG: 26px, XL: 35px, 2XL: 53px

### Border Radius
- Small: 8px
- Medium: 15px
- Large: 23px
- Full: 9999px

### Shadows
- SM: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 0px 32px 0px`
- MD: `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 10px 0px`
- LG: `rgb(97, 31, 105) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset`

## Design Decisions (from Mood Profile)

- **Subtle depth**: Moderate shadows for gentle elevation
- **Soft shapes**: Rounded corners, friendly feel
- **Balanced spacing**: Standard rhythm between elements
- **Medium headlines**: Clear hierarchy without overwhelming

## Agent Prompt Guide

### Quick Reference
- Primary: `#175a45`, Background: `#ffffff`
- Heading: Salesforce-Sans @ 600, Body: Salesforce-Avant-Garde @ 400
- Radius: 8px / 15px / 23px
- Spacing: 4px / 9px / 18px / 26px

### CSS Variables (ready to paste)
```css
:root {
  --color-primary: #175a45;
  --color-secondary: #ca6784;
  --color-accent: #727678;
  --color-bg: #ffffff;
  --color-surface: #f4ede4;
  --color-text: #000000;
  --color-text-secondary: #b35735;
  --color-text-muted: #1c66d0;
  --color-border: #f6eef0;
  --color-success: #22c55e;
  --color-warning: #f59e0b;
  --color-error: #ef4444;
  --radius-sm: 8px;
  --radius-md: 15px;
  --radius-lg: 23px;
  --shadow-sm: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 0px 32px 0px;
  --shadow-md: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 10px 0px;
  --shadow-lg: rgb(97, 31, 105) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset;
}
```
